title: CLUBHOUSE - 211info
text: NORTHSTAR CLUBHOUSE CLUBHOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides people with mental health challenges a working community to focus on social and vocational rehabilitation through two separate programs. Members participate in a structured working day in which members help staff operate the agency. This program also provides peer support, and social and recreational activities. 5600 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following qualifications: -Age 18 and older -Have a mental health diagnosis -Have a referral from a mental health professional -Attend orientation -Be willing to interact with other members and staff in a respectful manner Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, including major holidays for members Orientation: 1st and 3rd Wednesday of the month 3pm Email (971) 271-7273 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 271-7273 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Obtain a referral from a doctor, therapist, peer counselor, or other provider -Attend an orientation -Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Membership application AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 19 and 71, MAX Station on NE 60th Avenue Services: Vocational Rehabilitation * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHSTAR CLUBHOUSE
